arts.ttl: Paredes reflects on Roma future and Argentina national team
arts.sum: Leandro Paredes, currently on international duty with Argentina, has opened up about his uncertain future at Roma and his experiences with the national team. The 30-year-old midfielder, who has made seven appearances this season in Serie A and Europa League, spoke candidly about his situation at the club. “I live my life and my career day by day,” Paredes stated. “Obviously, there’s been a lot of talk, but now I’m focused on my club. I was very happy while De Rossi was there, then the coaching situation changed, and now it’s changing again…” Paredes’ contract with Roma is set to The post Paredes reflects on Roma future and Argentina national team appeared first on FootItalia.com.

arts.ttl: Vinícius back for Brazil and Martínez for Argentina in South American 2026 World Cup qualifying
arts.sum: All teams play again next Tuesday in the 12th round of games, when Argentina hosts Peru and Brazil has a home game against Uruguay. Argentina and Brazil will have two of their leading stars available again as South American qualifying for the 2026 World Cup resumes with the last two rounds of games this year.
